name: agentcouncil
description: Multi-agent deliberation protocols for Codex: brainstorm, review, decide, challenge, inspect, and autopilot gates with independent agents.

interface.shortDescription: Independent agent review and deliberation for Codex
interface.longDescription: AgentCouncil adds native Codex workflows for multi-agent brainstorms, reviews, decisions, challenges, inspection, and council-governed autopilot gates. Codex stays the host agent while AgentCouncil runs independent outside sessions through configured backends such as Claude, Codex, Ollama, OpenRouter, Bedrock, or Kiro.
defaultPrompt: Run an AgentCouncil review with Claude outside
Brainstorm this design with an independent agent
Challenge this plan before I ship it
